name: Grilled Portabello Mushroom Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the marinade ingredients in a bowl.
2. Marinate the portabello mushrooms in the mixture for 1-2 hours.
3. Mash the remaining garlic clove into a fine paste.
4. Stir the mashed garlic into the mayonnaise and add thyme.
5. Grill or broil the mushrooms for 5 minutes on each side, or until they are soft.
6. Sprinkle the red bell pepper with balsamic vinegar.
7. Grill or lightly toast the onion rolls.
8. Spread mayonnaise on each half of the onion rolls.
9. Place the grilled mushrooms on two halves of the onion rolls.
10. Cover with roasted bell pepper, cheese, and top with the remaining halves of the onion rolls.
11. Cut into halves and serve hot.
